text: Meet Argo — the tool that turns Playwright scripts into polished product demo videos, complete with AI voiceover.
The workflow is simple. Write a demo script using the Playwright API you already know. Argo records the browser, then exports a finished video.
Add overlays like lower-thirds and headline cards. Argo generates voiceover narration from a simple JSON manifest.
Your demo scripts are just Playwright tests with a few extra helpers. If you know Playwright, you already know Argo.
Install Argo, initialize your project, and ship your first demo video in minutes.
Oh, and this demo? It was recorded by Argo, using Argo.
